name: wordpress-codex
description: Codex skills and guardrails for WordPress theme and plugin development.

interface.shortDescription: WordPress implementation, review, debug, and migration skills
interface.longDescription: Codex-native WordPress skills focused on package boundaries, security, WPCS compliance, Gutenberg workflows, and structured review output.
defaultPrompt: Use $wp-feature to add a WordPress feature with WPCS and security guardrails.
Use $wp-review to review this WordPress change for security, correctness, and maintainability.
Use $wp-debug to investigate this WordPress bug before proposing a fix.
